> ⚠️ **DO NOT disclose vulnerabilities publicly.**
> Open a [private security advisory](https://github.com/Piero24/claude-swiss-army-knife/security/advisories/new) instead of a public issue for critical findings.

## Description

Brief description of the vulnerability (keep details minimal in public issues).

## Affected Component

Which MCP server, library, or service is affected?

## Impact

What could an attacker do?
